title: Life After Pro Sport
author: Charlie Powell
description:
My Life After Pro Sport is a podcast where I chat with former professional athletes about what life is really like after sport.


We talk about the highs and lows of retiring, the lessons their sporting careers taught them, the challenges of finding a new identity, and how they’re navigating the transition into the real world. From business and careers to mindset, relationships, purpose and personal growth, every conversation is an honest look at life beyond the game.


Whether you played professional sport, competed at any level, or simply know what it’s like to move on from something that once defined you, this podcast is for you.

title: PETAL Podcast
author: PETAL Consortium
description: Welcome to the PETAL Podcast! PETAL Consortium is a global network of more than 100 investigators from over 20 international medical centers dedicated to advancing care and research for peripheral T-cell lymphoma (or PTCL). In this series, we will explore topics related to PTCL to help guide healthcare professionals when caring for patients with this rare and aggressive blood cancer.

title: The Stretton Street Affair: Secrets of a War Return
author: William Le Queux
description: In post-war London, Hugh Gabriel returns to his life as an electrical engineer, but ordinary days quickly vanish. One fateful night, he encounters a servant who leads him to a wealthy, distressed master, Oswald De Gex. What begins as a simple visit spirals into a web of intrigue and danger as Hugh finds himself entangled in a chilling murder case. Is the enigmatic De Gex a victim or a villain? And what secrets lie behind the facade of Doctor Moroni, the physician who seems to have a hidden agenda? As Hugh delves deeper, he uncovers truths that challenge his perceptions of loyalty and justice. Join him on a suspenseful journey where every twist and turn keeps you guessing. Can he unravel the mystery before becoming the next target? Experience a tale filled with suspense, unexpected alliances, and the persistent shadows of the past in this classic detective fiction by William Le Queux.

title: Doobie n Pins
author: Jennifer
description: Married couple candidly and casually address random, every day topics.

title: The Collaborative Rabbit Hole
author: Luke Loe
description:
Nothing is as straightforward as it seems.
Join cousins Luke and Brandon as they explore faith, history, philosophy, culture, science, humor, and every rabbit trail along the way. Some conversations are insightful. Some are absurd. Most are both.
If you've ever wondered where unrestrained curiosity might lead, this podcast is for you.

title: Faith Filled Healing | Root Cause, Functional Medicine, Chronic Illness, Gut Health, Autoimmune, Detox, Healing journey
author: Sarah Phillipe | FDN-P, Holistic Health Practitioner, Root Cause Detective
description:
SEASON ONE LAUNCHES jULY 13TH, 2026! SUBSCRIBE NOW! Are you tired of feeling like your life is on hold until you finally heal? Do you feel like you've tried everything and you're still not getting better? Are you exhausted from chasing answers, jumping from protocol to protocol, and wondering what you're missing? Do you feel overwhelmed by conflicting health advice, frustrated by symptoms that won't go away, and worried that this might just be your new normal? Have you ever wondered if there's a way to pursue healing without fear, confusion, or constantly feeling like your life is on hold until you finally get better?

If so, you're in the right place.

Welcome to Faith-Filled Healing — the podcast for Christian women who are physically exhausted and spiritually weary from chasing answers.

Each week, you'll learn how to uncover the root causes behind chronic symptoms, support the body's God-designed healing mechanisms, and navigate your health journey with greater clarity, confidence, and peace. We'll talk about root-cause healing, detoxification, hormones, gut health, nervous system regulation, environmental toxins, and the practical tools that can help you feel your best.

But we'll also talk about the deeper issues many health podcasts never address: fear, striving, suffering, identity, surrender, and how to trust God when healing isn't happening on your timeline.

I'm Sarah Phillipe — a former Registered Nurse, Functional Diagnostic Nutrition Practitioner, Board-Certified Holistic Health Practitioner, wife, and follower of Jesus.

For years, I struggled with chronic illness, fatigue, inflammation, hormonal imbalances, breast implant illness, endometriosis, infertility, and a long list of unanswered questions. Like many of the women I now serve, I spent years searching for answers, trying protocols, taking supplements, and wondering why I still didn't feel like myself.

What I eventually discovered is that healing is about more than finding the right supplement or the next missing piece. True healing requires addressing root causes, supporting the whole person, and learning to steward your health without making healing your identity.

Today, I help Christian women understand their bodies, address the underlying causes of chronic symptoms, and pursue healing from a place of wisdom and peace rather than fear and striving.

If you're ready to stop chasing symptoms, uncover the root causes of your health challenges, and learn how to pursue healing while keeping Christ at the center, this podcast is for you.

So grab your coffee, open your Bible, head out for a walk, or settle into your favorite chair. Let's navigate the healing journey faithfully, steward our health wisely, and trust God with the outcome — together.

https://sarahphillipe.com/

title: Behind The Bone Deer hunting podcast
author: Steven Cirillo
description: Behind The Bone is a podcast about the pursuit of mature whitetails, the lessons learned in the woods, and the journey behind the harvest. From Long Island public land giants to out-of-state adventures, host Steven Cirillo shares hunting stories, strategies, failures, and the life lessons discovered along the way. Real Life. Real Grind. Not Just The Grip and Grin.

title: Murder Takes the Veil: A Bayou Mystery
author: Margaret Ann Hubbard
description: In the eerie Louisiana bayou, suspense lurks around every corner. Trillium Pierce finds herself caught in a deadly game as a mysterious murderer stalks her friends at Aurelian College, cloaked in a nun's habit. With each chilling twist, Trillium battles her own fears while trying to uncover the truth behind this menace. The killer believes his dark fate is written in the stars, but can Trillium and her friends outsmart him before it's too late? This gripping detective fiction weaves together themes of friendship, fear, and the struggle for survival in a haunting landscape. Margaret Ann Hubbard crafts a story that keeps listeners on the edge of their seats, blending rich character development with a chilling plot. Prepare for a journey into the depths of fear and resilience, where every shadow could hide a deadly secret.

title: The Operation Coffee Podcast
author: Sam Floyd
description: Every conversation starts with a cup of coffee

title: The Soul of Connection
author: Tressa Yonekawa
description: You can be smart, successful, and completely wrecking the relationships that matter most — and not even see it. I'm Tressa Yonekawa. Two degrees in the neuroscience of connection, thirty years proving this stuff actually changes people. Welcome to The Soul of Connection. Let's get into it.

title: Mindset & Duty
author: Yuleidis Pardo
description: "What drives professional succes? In this short episode, I share my personal perspective on the mindset, ethics, and duties required to navigate the academic and corporate world effectively, focusing on key obligations and continuos growth".

title: Coop-a-Log ¬-¬ Film Diary & Reviews
author: Cooper
description: Hi! My name is Cooper, hence the name Coop-a-Log. In this show I will discuss the films I watched in any given week and provide a quick overview so you can see if this is something that you would be interested in. I hope that this will encourage more people to watch films they usually wouldn't as I try to cover them in a fun way.

title: Lawyer Marketing Lab
author: SMB Team
description: The Lawyer Marketing Lab Podcast with Bill Hauser is an in-depth law firm marketing and growth podcast. Looking to flat-line your law firm? Looking to grow by 2% per-year? Please don't tune in. This is for law firm partners and marketing directors who are interested in exponential growth, not linear growth. Marketing has to do with more than just marketing. It has to do with how your firm is run, how good of a leader you are, and how you THINK. Think like a law firm growth wizard, with the Lawyer Marketing Lab Podcast.

title: Atlas IM Boards
author: ATLAS
description:
Internal medicine has more moving parts than anyone can hold in their head at once. Atlas IM Boards is here to help you carry them.
Each short episode takes one high-yield concept — the kind that shows up on the boards and in your clinic the same week — and explains it clearly enough to remember on the drive to work. No filler, no forty-minute detours. Just the core ideas, made memorable.
Whether you're revising for the exam or sharpening what you already use every day, these are the concepts worth keeping close.
From the physicians at Atlas Intensive Care.

title: Not Another Healer
author: Ki Marie
description:
For so long I've looked past myself for healing. For someone to tell me what's wrong and how to fix it - OH - And which way to go. I never looked within. Until now... My name is Ki ("Key"). I have been dreaming of starting a podcast for a long time... 
This is storytelling, connection, message, and reflection. We work together on a journey of healing from within. This is a work in progress! No music, no editing, no fabulous production. Just honest words for whomever needs to hear without the glamour and pizazz. Please, allow this process and growth as we embark on this new endeavor.

title: The Red Seal: A Mystery of Deception
author: Natalie Sumner Lincoln
description: In the heart of a bustling city, a series of puzzling events unfolds, drawing listeners into a web of intrigue. Natalie Sumner Lincoln invites you to explore the mysteries of 'Red Seal,' where nothing is as it appears. As you journey through this captivating detective tale, the line between truth and deception blurs with every twist and turn. Red seals signal danger, while red herrings lead you down unexpected paths, keeping you guessing until the very last moment. Packed with suspense and unexpected revelations, this audiobook immerses you in a world where every clue matters and every character has something to hide. Get ready for an enthralling experience that will challenge your wits and leave you craving resolution. Ideal for fans of classic detective fiction, 'Red Seal' promises to engage your mind and entertain your imagination.

title: The FPR Method Podcast
author: B.W. Sloane
description:
Real cases. Real patterns. Real investigations.
Learn how to identify suspects, uncover motive, reconstruct timelines, and recognize the hidden patterns behind violent crime using The FPR Method. Hosted by B.W. Sloane, this true crime podcast combines criminology and forensic astrology to teach forensic pattern recognition through real criminal cases. Whether you're fascinated by crime or dream of helping solve cases, each episode builds practical investigative skills you can apply. Continue your training with The FPR Method books, courses, and student community.

title: Juju & Gems
author: big mama juju
description: Welcome to JuJu & Gems with Big MaMa JuJu, where wisdom is shared, stories are told, and gems are dropped. This space is a portal into African Traditional Religions and the people who practice them. From social media trends and community conversations to my personal experiences, spiritual downloads, and interviews with fellow jujus, we'll dive into the topics that matter most to our community with honesty, humor, and a little bit of magic. Pull up a seat and let's talk juju.

title: Can We Say That Out Loud?
author: The Integrated Mom
description: The podcast where working moms tell the truth, hosted by Greer Van Dyck and Kara Fresk!

title: Optometry Profits Revealed with Peter Precht
author: Peter Precht
description:
Welcome to Optometry Profits Revealed with Peter Precth, your ultimate resource for achieving profitability in the eye care industry amidst modern disruptions. We delve into everything from online frame purchasing, innovative prescription programs, to state-of-the-art lead generation and sales software.

Join us as we help opticians, ophthalmologists, and optometrists navigate through these challenging times and grow their businesses to unprecedented heights. Learn from industry experts, successful eye care entrepreneurs, and our host's own wealth of experience in the field. Tune in and gain a clear vision of your path to eye care business success.

Get your free digital consultation here: https://eyecclearly.com/

title: Quiet Thoughts
author: Asiya Muhammad
description:
Welcome to my very first episode! In a world that moves so fast, I wanted to create a little corner of the internet where we can slow down. Today, I’m introducing myself and sharing the heart behind this podcast: a space dedicated to quiet reflections on faith, growth, and the ups and downs of girlhood. You don’t have to have it all figured out to be doing well. Thank you for listening and joining me on this journey.
#QuietThoughts #PersonalGrowth #DeenAndGirlhood #ReflectiveJournal #SlowGrowth #Asiya #Mindfulness

title: Starborn Parenting Podcast
author: Alexis
description: Every parent has been there. The tantrum in the grocery store, the bedtime negotiation, the sticker chart that flat-out failed. The Starborn Parenting Podcast is here to help, with real science and zero shame. It's hosted by Rick Kubina, PhD, one of the most respected names in behavior science, and Madeline Jürgensen, a doctoral-level board certified behavior analyst and mom. Each episode turns decades of research into simple, practical tools you can actually use at home. Through honest stories from their own parenting and grandparenting (the wins and the messes), Rick and Madeline explain what's really driving your child's behavior and how to shape it with warmth instead of bribes, threats, or the latest influencer advice. No jargon and no gatekeeping, just proven strategies to help you feel less alone, more equipped, and confident that you're raising a good human. New episodes weekly.

title: The Whole Word Podcast
author: Dr. James Griffin
description:
The Whole Word Podcast is a teaching and discipleship podcast from WordVision Ministries, created to help believers read Scripture with confidence, clarity, and purpose. Each episode slows down the pace, opens the Bible with intentionality, and guides listeners through practical tools that make God’s Word feel accessible not overwhelming.
Rather than rushing through verses or offering surface‑level inspiration, The Whole Word Podcast focuses on understanding the whole story of Scripture: what God is saying, why it matters, and how it shapes the way we live today.

title: LastDaySoldiers
author: Josiah Burris
description:
This is a podcast for believers who are hungry for more than comfortable Christianity. It's a call to move beyond lukewarm faith and into a life of wholehearted devotion to Jesus Christ.
Through honest biblical teaching, personal reflection, and Spirit-led encouragement, each episode challenges listeners to grow in spiritual maturity, deepen their relationship with Christ, and walk in the fullness of their God-given identity.

title: The Bottom Line Up Front With Terry Wade Thompson
author: Terry Wade Thompson
description:
A podcast about Leadership, Lifestyle Advice, Mindset, Health and Fitness, Business, and much more . . 
My goal is to provide you with tips, tools, techniques, and resources that will empower you to:
🌟 Become the Leader you are meant to be
🧠 Become more mindful
💪 Establish better habits
🔥 Live your life more intentional every day
Discover more at:
Website: https://terrywadethompson.com/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/terrywadethompson/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@terrywadethompson
X (Twitter): https://x.com/TerryWThompson
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/terrywadethompson/

title: Mind Fit For Football Podcast
author: Micheal
description:
Helping ambitious footballers and parents build the mindset, confidence and mental resilience needed to perform under pressure and reach the next level.
My job is simple: take the noise out of their heads so they play with more freedom.
Some episodes are just me, breaking down one idea you can use with your child this week. 
Others are honest conversations with coaching experts and ex-pros, as well.
If you have ever stood on the touchline thinking there is more in there, I do not know how to get it out of him. This is the show for you.

title: 57e
description: 57e - Beyond functionality, this digital space emphasizes creating a positive and secure environment for its users. Privacy protection and data security are treated as top priorities, giving users confidence. The platform also fosters a welcoming atmosphere by encouraging respectful communication and meaningful engagement. Overall, it serves not only as a place for leisure but also as a hub where individuals can unwind, connect, and explore new forms of digital interaction in a safe and enjoyable setting. WEB: https://57e.news/

title: Point of Contact | A Würth Knowing Podcast
author: Würth Industry USA
description:
The Point of Contact podcast brings industry conversations closer to the people, ideas, and challenges shaping the future of supply chain, manufacturing, distribution, and beyond.
Powered by Würth Knowing, this podcast creates space for thoughtful conversations with experts, leaders, partners, and team members across the industry. Each episode explores the connections that move business forward, from customer relationships and operational insights to innovation, culture, and the real-world experiences behind the work.
Stick around, there's so much more Würth Knowing!

title: Beyond Her Veil
author: Maria Asare
description: Beyond Her Veil is a space where I share the things God is teaching me in real time. Through short reflections, Scripture, and honest conversations, I invite you into my journey of following Christ, growing in faith, and learning what it truly means to reveal, heal, and become who He created us to be. If you’re simply trying to know God more deeply, you’re in the right place.

title: Why Spiritual Sensitivity Is Important
author: Wisdom Akpan (Erick)
description:
In a world filled with noise, distractions, and endless voices competing for attention, spiritual sensitivity has never been more important. This podcast explores why every believer must develop the ability to discern God’s voice, recognize divine direction, and remain spiritually alert in these critical times.

“Spiritual Sensitivity Is Needed” dives deep into the importance of walking closely with God, growing in prayer, and strengthening your spiritual awareness. When you become spiritually sensitive, you begin to see beyond the physical, understand God’s leading, and avoid costly spiritual mistakes.

Join us as we discuss practical ways to sharpen your spiritual senses, deepen your relationship with God, and position yourself to hear clearly from the Holy Spirit. Whether you are seeking spiritual growth, clarity, or deeper intimacy with God, this message will inspire and challenge you.

Stay connected, stay prayerful, and stay spiritually alert.

title: Awake With God, Sleep in Peace
author: Esther
description:
Awake with God, Sleep in Peace
Welcome to Awake with God, Sleep in Peace, your daily place of prayer, hope, and encouragement.
Every sunrise is a fresh opportunity to walk with God, and every night is a chance to rest in His unfailing love. This podcast is dedicated to helping you begin each day with faith and end each evening with peace through powerful Christian prayers and the timeless truth of God's Word.
Join us every day for uplifting morning prayers, peaceful bedtime prayers, daily Bible devotionals, Scripture readings, declarations of faith, prayers for healing, protection, guidance, favour, family, finances, strength, and spiritual growth.
Whether you are facing uncertainty, seeking comfort, celebrating blessings, or simply longing for a closer relationship with God, each episode is created to encourage your heart, strengthen your faith, and remind you that you are never alone.
No matter where you are in the world, take a few moments each day to pause, pray, and experience God's presence.
New prayer episodes every day.
Follow Awake with God, Sleep in Peace and make prayer the first and last part of every day. Share this show with your family and friends so that more people can experience God's love, hope, and peace.
"In peace I will lie down and sleep, for You alone, Lord, make me dwell in safety." — Psalm 4:8
Awake with God, Sleep in Peace
Wake up with faith. Rest in God's peace. Live each day in His presence.

title: InspectaCAR Vehicle Inspection in Calgar
author: InspectaCAR
description:
InspectaCAR Vehicle Inspection in Calgary Discussing Car Inspection Calgary Standards


InspectaCAR presents an informative podcast dedicated to helping drivers understand the importance of vehicle inspection in Calgary and why a professional car inspection Calgary service plays a vital role in maintaining road safety, vehicle reliability, and long-term ownership value. This episode explores the complete inspection process while providing practical insights for first-time buyers, experienced motorists, fleet operators, and anyone interested in making informed automotive decisions.Throughout the discussion, listeners learn how comprehensive vehicle inspections evaluate critical systems that influence overall performance and safety. The conversation explains the importance of examining engines, transmissions, brakes, suspension components, steering systems, electrical equipment, lighting, tires, wheels, exhaust systems, cooling systems, batteries, and fluid levels. Every topic is presented in an easy-to-understand format that helps simplify technical concepts for everyday drivers.The podcast also examines how routine inspections help identify developing mechanical concerns before they become expensive repairs. Early detection of worn components, fluid leaks, brake wear, tire damage, suspension issues, and electrical faults allows owners to address problems proactively while reducing maintenance costs and improving overall vehicle dependability. Preventive maintenance remains one of the most effective strategies for extending vehicle lifespan and enhancing driving confidence.Another important segment focuses on pre-purchase inspections for used vehicles. Listeners discover why an independent inspection can provide valuable information regarding a vehicle's mechanical condition, structural integrity, accident history indicators, frame alignment, corrosion, previous repairs, and overall roadworthiness. Understanding these factors enables buyers to make confident purchasing decisions while avoiding unexpected repair expenses after ownership begins.Modern automotive technology continues transforming inspection procedures, and the episode explores how advanced diagnostic equipment supports accurate evaluations. Digital scanning systems, computerized diagnostics, electronic testing equipment, emission assessments, and precision measuring tools help technicians identify faults efficiently while improving inspection accuracy. These innovations contribute to reliable assessments and greater transparency throughout the evaluation process.Safety remains a central theme throughout the conversation. Properly functioning braking systems, steering components, suspension assemblies, lighting equipment, windshield visibility, tire condition, and safety restraints all contribute to protecting drivers, passengers, and other road users. The discussion explains why regular inspections help maintain compliance with recommended safety standards while promoting responsible vehicle ownership.The episode further highlights the benefits of maintaining complete service records and inspection documentation. Organized maintenance histories support resale value, improve buyer confidence, simplify future servicing, and demonstrate responsible ownership. Listeners also receive practical advice regarding seasonal maintenance, winter driving preparation, tire condition monitoring, battery performance, fluid replacement schedules, and general vehicle care throughout changing weather conditions.Whether preparing for a road trip, purchasing a pre-owned vehicle, maintaining a family automobile, or managing a commercial fleet, this podcast delivers educational content designed to improve automotive knowledge and encourage informed maintenance decisions. The discussion combines professional insights with practical recommendations that drivers can easily understand and apply.Designed for motorists of every experience level, this episode serves as a valuable educational resource covering inspection procedures, preventive maintenance, vehicle safety, diagnostic technology, mechanical reliability, and responsible ownership practices. Through engaging conversation and industry-focused information, listeners gain a deeper appreciation for the value of professional vehicle inspection in Calgary and dependable car inspection Calgary services while learning how routine inspections contribute to safer driving, improved performance, greater reliability, and long-term vehicle protection.


To Know More Visit : https://inspectacar.ca/

title: Inclusion Starts Here: The EYSEN Podcast
author: Best Practice Network
description: Inclusion Starts Here, presented by Best Practice Network, is a podcast dedicated to exploring the people, ideas and actions that make inclusion a reality. Find out more at https://www.bestpracticenet.co.uk/early-years-SENCO

title: MXPrize
author: mxprize88mx1
description: MXPrize - Em poucos cliques é possível experimentar novas dinâmicas, testar estratégias e descobrir maneiras diferentes de interagir com o sistema. Essa diversidade transforma cada visita em uma experiência única, pois o ambiente está sempre evoluindo. Keragaman ini membantu menghindari rasa bosan dan mendorong eksplorasi dalam jangka panjang. Selain itu, pembaruan yang dilakukan secara rutin memastikan bahwa pengguna selalu memiliki hal baru untuk dinikmati. WEB: https://mxprize88.mx/

title: The Gathering Hub Podcast
author: The Gathering Hub Podcast
description: The Gathering Hub Podcast Hosted by Enrique "El Kike" Moreno, Juan "Whitey" Hernandez, and Maximiliano "B-wop" Lara is a place to gather and have discussions from funny to topical subjects, and anything in between. With Possibilities of special appearances from friends to gather their opinion on said subjects.

title: Breaking Bread powered by Harmonic
author: Bread and Jam
description: Building a food or drink brand is exciting, but it’s also full of expensive mistakes waiting to happen. Breaking Bread is the podcast that helps you avoid them. Hosted by Jason Gibb, co-founder of Bread & Jam, each episode gets real with founders, investors, buyers, and industry pros who have been through it all - the wins, the lows, and everything in between. Whether you are just getting started or scaling at speed, this is your go-to podcast for real talk, practical advice, and a community that believes success tastes better when shared.

title: Story World
author: story world
description:
Welcome to Story World — where every story comes alive.

From thrilling adventures and chilling mysteries to heartfelt tales and unforgettable life experiences, there’s always a new story waiting for you. Sit back, relax, and let your imagination travel to worlds beyond your own.

New stories uploaded regularly. Follow and join the journey—because every story deserves to be heard.

title: Human Scale: Technology, Attention, and the Art of Staying Human
author: William Carty
description: My name is William Carty. I’m a dad, a writer, and I spent close to thirty years working in IT, helping wire up the same digital systems I find myself wondering about these days. Human Scale is my attempt to pay attention to how technology, community, and daily life fit together. Mostly, I’m interested in what it takes to stay human in a world that keeps speeding up.

title: Echo chamber
author: WESTINO
description:
Storytellers, Creators & Change-Makers Across Every Industry
Note From The Host: My ideal guest is anyone with a compelling story, hard-won wisdom, or a unique perspective that connects to music, creativity, purpose, or the human experience. Whether you're an artist, entrepreneur, author, coach, athlete, or industry professional. if your story resonates, Echo Chamber wants to hear it.

title: A Different Game
author: Golfran Rivera
description:
Most people work hard their whole lives and still feel stuck. Not because they're lazy, but because nobody taught them the rules of the game.
A Different Game is a story-driven series for young adults who are ready to start thinking differently about purpose, money, and building a life on their own terms. Each season follows a new character navigating real challenges and learning the mental frameworks that actually change outcomes.
This isn't self-help. It's a story. But it might change the way you think.
New seasons dropping regularly. Start with Episode 1.

title: The After Church Podcast with Mike and Tabitha Harder
author: ALIGHT
description: We’re Pastor Mike and Tabitha Harder, and we hope our discussions are a blessing to you as we navigate relationships, parenting, ministry, culture, and living alight with authentic faith in Jesus.

title: Let Us Cook
author: Chef Kevin
description:
Who has time to learn a new hobby? My guests certainly don't. They're too busy being successful/famous/cool.
On Let Us Cook, I spend one month learning something they've always wanted to try, but haven't. My hope is to convince them to finally give it a go.

title: Black Creek Baptist Church
author: Black Creek Baptist Church
description:
King James Bible Preaching services from Black Creek Baptist Church in Black Creek New York.

A variety of topics.

Visit our ministry website at Onesoulatatime.net

title: Dead Ink
author: Dead Ink
description:
Every tattoo tells a story. Most of them are darker than you'd expect.


Dead Ink is a weekly anthology podcast about the hidden history of tattooing — the codes, the criminals, the outcasts, and the moments when ink changed everything. Russian prison gangs. Yakuza masters. Circus performers. Naval superstitions. Forensic detectives. Each episode takes one story from the underground history of marked skin and tells it the way it deserves to be told: with precision, without sensationalism, and with everything that makes it strange.

New episodes every week.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: Unlocking The Paradigm Portal
author: Sarah C.
description:
You already know something needs to change. You've known for a while.
Unlocking the Paradigm Portal is the invitation to stop performing okay and actually look. Into the attachment wounds. Into the nervous system. Into the stories you forgot were stories.
Hosted by Sarah — attachment coach, somatic practitioner, someone who has sat in her own wreckage and decided to look anyway.
Hard-hitting mornings. Soft nights. Deep Sundays.
This is not self-help. This is self-honesty.

title: The Rx Files
author: The Vanguard Network
description:
The pharmaceutical industry touches every one of us, but most of us don't understand how it works — or why. Why does it cost so much to bring a new drug to market? Who's actually setting the prices you pay at the pharmacy? Is Big Pharma hiding the cure for cancer? And why does the US lead the world in drug discovery, yet rank among the worst in affordability?

The Rx Files is here to answer those questions — in plain English, without the jargon and without the spin.

Hosted by Nancy Lurker, a 40-year pharmaceutical industry veteran who has worked across Big Pharma, the service sector, and biotech - including as a CEO - alongside veteran journalist Ken Stone, The Rx Files brings frank, informed, and often provocative conversation to one of the most consequential industries on earth. Nancy knows the industry's strengths and its warts, and she's not afraid to talk about both. Ken is there to ask the questions the rest of us would ask if we had the chance.

Each episode, they'll go deep on a different piece of the puzzle — drug discovery, clinical trials, pricing, regulation, the role of insurance and pharmacy benefit managers, and much more. At every step they’ll be joined by guests who are actually in the room where it happens.

And of course they’ll be tackling all the questions you’d like to hear answered! You can reach the intrepid team at answers@TheRXFiles.com or comment directly at the end of the episodes.

The Rx Files is produced by The Vanguard Network and made possible with the support of Syneos Health.

title: Don't Make It Worse
author: Makenzie Mizell
description:
Everything is political, but that doesn’t mean everything has to be a fight.
Each week Makenzie Mizell talks to experts and people with lived experience - sometimes it’s serious and sometimes it’s fun. From sex work to prison abolition, we unpack the subjects people usually argue about through curiosity, compassion, and a willingness to ask questions.
We’re looking to make things better. You’re invited.

title: Bible Stories
author: True Crime Stories
description: Welcome to my channel, where we will delve into the rich and inspiring narratives of biblical stories.

title: Nightmail
author: Nightmail
description: Stop at the station from time to time because you never know who is driving the train or what new entertainment it will the deliver. If you like to laugh, enjoy unique conversations and thirst for a new stream of entertainment, this is your stop.

title: Mostly Domestic: A Generational Podcast
author: Joy and Ley
description: Two women, two generations, and countless opinions. Join Joy and Ley as they dive into relationships, family, pop culture, and the everyday moments that connect us. From hilarious stories to honest conversations, Mostly Domestic is where different generations come together to laugh, learn, and keep it real.

title: The Best News Ever
author: The Best News Ever Team
description: The Best News Ever is a podcast about one message that changes everything: Jesus died for your sins, was buried, and rose again. That finished work reconciles you back to God, and it settles your hope, your peace, and your assurance in who you are. Here we teach the gospel of grace without the religious fog, so you understand what Christ already accomplished, who you are in Christ because of it, and how to walk out that identity in everyday life. This is a place to dive into Scripture, work through Bible studies, and find resources that help you understand God's Word and stand on what grace has already made true about you.

title: Avoid Scams
author: Orientation to Ontario (O2O)
description: This O2O podcast explains common scams in Ontario, including fake websites, emails, texts, and phone calls. It highlights warning signs, such as requests for personal information or money, and offers tips to stay safe, emphasizing that government agencies will not make threatening demands or ask for payments this way. [orientatio...ontario.ca]

title: Drinking with Dawn
author: Dawn Mushill

Your hosts: Adam Jay and Dale Zwizinski are co-founders of Revenue Reimagined. They didn't build a consulting firm. They’ll take the mic to teach us exactly how they’re winning in their industry today—but we aren't stopping there.

Simple, honest podcasts about the lifestyle traps we fall into, and how to live better, longer, and healthier.

And while I’ve got your attention, you may come across some obviously fake, AI-generated videos using my face and name. There seems to be a new channel every week, something that’s becoming increasingly common among YouTube doctors unfortunately...

Please be assured that I am not behind any of these and do not endorse any of the information coming from these quite frightening AI versions of me.

Let’s spread the word and help prevent any dangerous medical misinformation being shared like this.

Thanks so much! And have a great day!

Dr Alex

author: Trevor
description: The show outlines a radical soccer strategy called the Pragmatic System, which prioritizes winning over aesthetic appeal. The argument is that teams should reject the "beautiful game" and instead, for example, use long balls to bypass risky passing in their own defensive zones. The guide emphasizes administrative alignment, requiring coaches to secure board protection against being fired for using these "ugly" but effective tactics.

title: Overcome Rejection at Work ⎸ Neurodivergent, ADHD, RSD, Workplace, Confidence
author: Yardley Messeroux - Work Wellness Coach & Mental Wellness Advocate
description:
Do you want to feel like you belong in the workplace God has placed you, even when you don’t “have it all together?” Are you tired of overthinking what people think of you? Wish you could stop letting insecurity take control? Want to create a work environment that honors how your brain works?
I’m so happy you’re here! This podcast will help you learn powerful ways to reverse the effects of a root of insecurity—which is rejection, using Scriptures. And you’ll learn about the neurodivergent brain—so you can create a work-life where you feel more confident and competent as you navigate work.  
Hi, I’m Yardley. Jesus-girl, author, Work Wellness Coach, and Organizational Psychology grad student—with a late-diagnosed neurodivergent brain. Throughout almost two decades as a working professional, I tried so much to fit into molds at work that weren’t meant for me to fit into.
With not quite fitting in, comes being misunderstood, and thus rejection in various ways—whether real, perceived or having the fear of rejection. I would find myself wondering what co-workers and leaders thought about me, felt insecure about saying the wrong things while trying so hard to sound eloquent. I didn’t honor how I was uniquely designed—ultimately rejecting myself. After wondering why I functioned differently for so long, I found great strategies that actually work! 
But what’s even more important is using the Bible to help navigate our thoughts as we tackle rejection in the hurdles of work.
I’m super excited to share how using His Word and understanding how your brain was uniquely designed can help you navigate work grounded in godly security. 
If you are ready for…
A more peaceful and powerful thought-life at work, grounded in the Word
Freedom from self-doubt, rumination, comparison, imposter syndrome, and masking
Insight about your brain, so you can effectively navigate where you’ve been placed by God
…then this podcast is for you!
Stir up that mushroom coffee, and let’s dive in!

title: The In-Demand Agency Podcast
author: Stephen Woessner
description:
For the last four years, the Sell with Authority podcast focused on one core idea…how to help agencies earn trust before asking for the sale. And it worked.
Agencies that chose a niche, committed to a point of view, and taught what they know in service of the right audience became recognized. Their thinking traveled. And prospects began to show up more prepared, more confident, and more aligned.
But over time, a pattern emerged inside the Predictive Lab. Agencies that had built an authority position no longer struggled to be seen. They struggled with creating and activating demand. Prospects knew them. Respected them. Even believed they were the right agency to choose. And still…they waited.
Authority earns attention. But demand…demand is what turns that attention into action.
The In-Demand Agency Podcast picks up exactly where that realization begins.
Each episode of the In-Demand Agency Podcast deconstructs the science of demand…from behavioral psychology, decision-making research, and the cross-industry strategies behind why B2B buyers make decisions. We interview the world's leading behavioral scientists, global agency network leaders, and strategists from industries far beyond ours…voices you may have never heard but who are reshaping how demand works.
Then we translate their insights directly into the agency world. Think of it as the "Harvard Business Review" for agency owners who are done with guesswork and ready for growth.
The In-Demand Agency Podcast is hosted by Stephen Woessner, CEO of Predictive ROI. If the conversation around how to create intrigue, curiosity, and desire with intention so you activate demand, choose the clients you want to work with, and so you can reach your biz dev goals faster resonates with where you are and where you're headed…we'd love for you to join us here.

title: Vjosa | L’ultimo fiume selvaggio d’Europa
author: LifeGate e CESVI
description:
C’è un luogo in Europa dove l'acqua scorre ancora senza barriere.

È il bacino della Vjosa, l’ultimo grande fiume selvaggio del nostro continente. Un miracolo naturalistico lungo 272 km diventato un Parco nazionale che attraversa i canyon e le valli nel sud dell’Albania, custodendo specie ed ecosistemi unici e culture millenarie.

Il suo futuro, però, è appeso a un equilibrio fragilissimo. Lo minacciano le contraddizioni dello sviluppo: lo sfruttamento delle sue acque, i grandi progetti per il turismo di massa e l'inquinamento.

"Vjosa. L’ultimo fiume selvaggio d’Europa" è un audiodocumentario che dà voce alle comunità che abitano e difendono questi luoghi. Un viaggio sonoro che dall’ecosistema profondo delle montagne e dei piccoli villaggi scende lungo la corrente fino alla foce del fiume. 

Un podcast prodotto da LifeGate e Cesvi, con il supporto del Ministero degli affari esteri e della cooperazione internazionale, attraverso l'Agenzia Italiana per la Cooperazione allo Sviluppo (AICS) con il progetto VITA-Vjosa.

Scritto da Benedetta Gori e Marco Rip Supervisione editoriale: Camilla Soldati Regia e produzione audio a cura di Marco Rip Supervisione artistica: Giacomo De Poli

Un ringraziamento speciale a Simona Carpinelli, Mattia Borelli, Simona Denti, Julian Elezi ed Elidijon Thanasi per Cesvi.

description:

The gastroenterology series covers the full blueprint across nine modules: esophagus, stomach and duodenum, small bowel, colon, pelvic floor, liver, pancreas and biliary, endoscopy, and the cross-cutting topics. Episodes are grouped by chapter and built from the primary guidelines and pivotal trials the boards draw from (ACG, AGA, AASLD, ASGE), not from textbook summaries.
Use it as an audio companion to the written curriculum, MCQs, and AI tutor at boardpearls.com. Questions or feedback: hello@boardpearls.com.

author: Jocelyn Lathrop
description:
Every home has secrets. Some are hidden. Some are buried. And some end in tragedy.
Behind Closed Doors is a true crime podcast that explores some of the most chilling family annihilation cases from around the world. From seemingly perfect families to unimaginable acts of violence, each episode takes a deep dive into the warning signs, hidden struggles, and devastating events that unfolded when the people closest to home became the greatest threat.
Because sometimes the most dangerous secrets are the ones kept at home.

title: The Mystery of the Downs: Stormy Secrets
description:
A sudden storm sweeps across the downs, plunging the countryside into darkness. Amid the chaos, a puzzling mystery unfolds. When the storm clears, the body of a local man is found, sending shockwaves through the quiet community. Detective John Rhoades, determined and sharp, must navigate treacherous paths and hidden secrets to uncover the truth. As he delves deeper, he faces unexpected twists and turns that challenge his instincts and resolve. Can he solve the mystery before the past catches up with everyone involved?

In 'Mystery of the Downs,' Arthur J. Rees crafts a captivating detective fiction filled with suspense, vivid imagery, and complex characters. Listeners will be drawn into a world where every clue matters and danger lurks in the shadows. Experience the thrill of the investigation and the rich atmosphere of the setting, all while following Rhoades on his quest for justice. This audiobook is perfect for fans of classic mysteries and those who appreciate a well-told story that keeps them guessing until the very end.

Its an interactive podcast that has a guest panel asking their own person questions. Its an open discussion about any Farming and Ranching needs between the hosts and their guests. Catch the podcast live on Tuesdays on TikTok 5 PM Pacific, 6 PM Mountain, 7 PM Central, 8 PM Eastern time.

title: The Secured Self
author: The Secure Terminal
description:
Hey, I'm Jay P and I got tired of watching good people get caught off guard by scams and threats they never saw coming.
The Secured Self drops every Friday for small business owners, families, churches, and anyone on the Gulf Coast trying to protect what matters.
No tech background needed. No confusing language. Just real threats, real stories, and simple steps that actually work.
15 to 20 minutes. Once a week. The kind of conversation you'll want to share with someone you love.
Know Your Risk. Own Your Future.

title: The Vanished Babies
author: khatia shamanauri
description: For decades, thousands of babies in maternity hospitals were falsely declared dead. In the small country of Georgia, doctors told mothers that their newborns had died shortly after birth. But those babies were stolen, sold, and sent to new families — sometimes within Georgia, and sometimes to the United States, Canada, and across Europe. Now, mothers are discovering that the children they mourned for decades are alive. Join me as I investigate the network that operated in Georgia from the 1950s through the early 2000s, uncovering one of the country's darkest hidden stories.

title: Becoming A Proverbs 31:25 Woman | Finding Your Purpose | Women Empowerment | Clarify Your Calling | Overcoming Fear and Doubt | Self Love | Spiritual Growth | Community for Women
author: Stacie Connor
description:
Do you ever feel like God is calling you to more… but you’re not sure what that looks like in the middle of marriage, motherhood, and everyday life?

Welcome to Becoming a Proverbs 31:25 Woman — a podcast for Christian women who feel the quiet nudge from God to stop hiding their gifts and start stepping into the calling He placed on their lives.

Hosted by Stacie Connor, this podcast is a real and honest journey of learning to trust God one step at a time.

Through personal stories, behind-the-scenes reflections, and conversations with other women navigating faith, family, and purpose, you’ll discover how God meets us in the middle of everyday life — even when we feel ov

erwhelmed, uncertain, or stuck.

Together we’ll explore what it looks like to:

  • Trust God when you can’t see the full path

• Overcome fear and step into your calling

• Rediscover the gifts God placed inside you

• Navigate faith, family, and purpose as a mom and wife

You don’t have to have everything figured out. This is a journey of growth, of transformation

This podcast is about the journey of becoming — becoming the woman God created you to be.

If you’re a woman seeking encouragement, clarity, and community as you pursue God’s calling while managing life as a mom and wife you’re in the right place.

title: The Unfiltered Founder
author: Katrina Le Bar
description:
Welcome to The Unfiltered Founder podcast. I’m your host, Katrina Le Bar, entrepreneur, social media + business coach. In this space, we’re diving into the raw, no-BS side of entrepreneurship and social media. We’ll chat about social media strategy, personal development, spirituality, and the strategies that actually move the needle in your business. 
Tune in for inspiring conversations and unfiltered stories from entrepreneurs, packed with expert advice and what it really takes to build something from the ground up. If you’re ready to expand your life and business, this podcast is for you.

description: Join Becca Bain and Jade Gebbie as they discuss a different cosy crime show every two weeks. Each episode, one of the duo will bring a show to chat about, dissect and make a case about why the other should love that show. They’ll be discussing everything from Agatha Christie to… Well, when a cosy crime show starting with Z is created, that. So grab a cup of cocoa, your snuggliest blanket and join Becca and Jade for some cosy chats and ridiculous crimes.

Join Owen Wyatt and Michael McEwan as they lift the lid on the people, corporations and decisions shaping the golf industry today.
 
From brand leaders and tour insiders to innovators and disruptors changing how the game is played and consumed, each episode takes a deep dive into a different topic, explaining the deals, ideas and personalities propelling the sport forward.
 
Smart, sharp and unapologetically unfiltered, this is not your typical golf podcast.

Welcome to The Higher Call, the podcast where faith and fandom meet. We're just regular guys who love God, love sports, and love talking about both. author: Claire Lockey
description: The Business of You is the deeper work: creating space for the uncomfortable conversations that explore how you think, how you show up and how you position yourself. title: The Greater Peace Podcast
author: Amy Lindstrom, LCMHC
description:
The Greater Peace Podcast is a place to slow down, reconnect with yourself, and discover practical tools for creating lasting inner peace. 

Hosted by Amy Lindstrom, LCMHC, trauma and addiction therapist and creator of the Greater Peace Course, this podcast blends psychology, mindfulness, and timeless wisdom to help you navigate life's challenges with greater clarity, resilience, and self-compassion. 

Each week you'll find guided guided meditations, thoughtful conversations, and practical teachings on topics like emotional healing, relationships, understanding why we do what we do and how to make a different choice, the nervous system, strengthening intuition, finding confidence and self-worth, and living with greater peace and purpose. 


Whether you're just beginning your healing journey or have been doing personal growth work for years, you'll gain skills and wisdom to help you return to the peace that already exists within you. 

Together, we will learn that peace is possible during both the ups and downs of life--it's about learning how to use them to create more wholeness and compassion. 

Welcome to The Greater Peace Podcast! I'm so glad you are here.

title: Lost Man's Lane: A Mysterious Disappearance
description:
In the quiet stretches of rural New York, a sinister mystery unfolds. People have been disappearing along Lost Man's Lane, leaving behind a trail of confusion and fear. Enter Mr. Gryce, a seasoned detective, who teams up with the astute Miss Amelia Butterworth. Together, they delve into the strange occurrences that have baffled locals and law enforcement alike. As they piece together clues, they uncover secrets that lead to unexpected twists and revelations.

Anna Katharine Green, often hailed as the first female American detective fiction writer, crafts an intricate tale filled with suspense and keen observation. Listeners will be drawn into a world where every detail matters, and the truth hides beneath layers of deception. This audiobook promises not just a gripping mystery but also a fascinating glimpse into early detective storytelling. Follow Gryce and Butterworth as they race against time to solve the puzzle of Lost Man's Lane before more lives are lost.

description:
From Dragonball to Haikyuu, I have in-depth conversations on all things anime and manga. This podcast is where I break down the latest chapters, react to big moments, and dive into the stories, characters, and themes that keep us hooked page after page.
Whether it’s mainstream hits like One Piece and Jujutsu Kaisen or underrated gems you might’ve missed, I’m here to talk through it all like you’re chilling with a friend who’s just as deep into anime as you are. Expect honest takes, hype reactions, and real discussion from a fan who’s tuned in with the culture.

title: The Glowe Podcast
author: Whitney Kenter
description:
You're feeling it. Something is shifting in how you lead, how you work, and how you show up in the world. You're not sure what to call it yet, but you know the old way isn't working anymore.
The Glowe Podcast is where that conversation lives.
Hosted by Whitney, each episode explores energy, awareness, healing, and what real leadership and organizational change look like from the inside out. Sometimes that means a conversation with another leader, healer, or thinker. Other times it's just Whitney, naming what she's noticing in real time. Practical and spiritual. Grounded and honest.
If you're looking for a more aligned, more human way to lead and live, you're in the right place.

author: Albert Bonet
description:
Language creates reality. We are all storytellers, shaping our lives through the stories we tell ourselves and the world, whether we know it or not.
Authentic Storytelling is a series of conversations with filmmakers, speakers, musicians, and other souls whose art is expression. Together we look for new points of view, and for what it takes to create deep, real human connection: the kind that speaks to who we truly are and calls out our authenticity.

title: The Leavenworth Case: A Classic Detective Mystery
description: In the bustling streets of 19th-century New York, a wealthy man's murder sends shockwaves through society. 'The Leavenworth Case' introduces us to the brilliant detective Mr. Gryce, who navigates a tangled web of secrets and lies to uncover the truth. Written by Anna Katharine Green, known as the 'mother of the detective novel,' this story is a pioneering work in the genre, influencing future authors like Agatha Christie. As you delve into this captivating mystery, you'll encounter unexpected twists that keep you guessing until the very end. With rich character development and an intricate plot, Green’s debut novel is not just a whodunit; it's a deep exploration of human nature and morality. Join the investigation alongside Mr. Gryce and experience the thrill of solving a case where nothing is as it seems and every clue leads you deeper into the mystery.

title: Lets Talk About it with The Godmother
author: Michelle Cordero
description:
🎙️ LET’S TALK MUSIC WITH THE GODMOTHER | SEASON 2


Where music meets purpose.


Hosted by The Godmother, Let’s Talk Music is more than an interview—it’s a platform where artists, producers, songwriters, DJs, entrepreneurs, and music industry professionals share their journey, their testimony, and the story behind their success.


Each episode goes beyond the music, exploring the struggles, victories, lessons, faith, and legacy that shape today’s creators. 


Every guest closes with The Godmother Level—one unforgettable question designed to reveal who they are beyond their career.


📍Live every Wednesday at 9:00 PM EST on TikTok

title: Against Odds: A Detective's Pursuit
description: Set against the vibrant backdrop of the World's Fair, 'Against Odds' draws you into a thrilling web of crime and intrigue. Follow detective Carl Masters as he navigates the bustling streets of Chicago in pursuit of notorious conmen Greenback Bob and Delbras. As he investigates a series of puzzling events—lost handbags, jewel thefts, and even a chilling murder—Carl uncovers a world filled with deception and danger. With two young men missing and an adventuress complicating matters, the stakes have never been higher. This captivating detective story brings to life the challenges of solving crimes in a city teeming with excitement and peril. Experience the twists and turns of this gripping tale, where every clue could lead to the next breakthrough or a deadly trap. Join Carl on his relentless quest for justice, and discover how he confronts the odds stacked against him.

title: The Eight Strokes of the Clock: Mysteries with Arsène Lupin
description: In 'Eight Strokes of the Clock,' master thief turned detective Arsène Lupin takes center stage in a thrilling collection of short stories. Now living a life of intrigue instead of crime, Lupin adopts the identity of Prince Rénine. Alongside the captivating Hortense Daniel, he dives into a series of enigmatic mysteries that promise to keep listeners on the edge of their seats. Each tale showcases Lupin's cleverness and charm as he unravels puzzles that challenge his wit and skill. Whether it’s outsmarting rivals or solving perplexing crimes, Lupin’s adventures blend suspense and clever twists that will captivate fans of detective fiction. Join the escapades of a character who proves that even a reformed thief can be a master of deduction. Experience the thrill of the chase and the joy of uncovering secrets in this engaging journey through the world of Lupin.

description:
A storytelling podcast about harnessing your intuition.
The spontaneous decisions you make when logic says no. The fear you walk through anyway. The careers you outgrow, identities you shed, and the versions of yourself you never saw coming. This isn’t the highlight reel. Each episode is an unfiltered collection of real-life stories from a life lived in motion. From solo adventures, van life chapters, and long-haul truck driving across the USA, to starting over and backpacking the world while figuring it out in real time. Go With Wild is a reminder that your intuition often knows the way before you do. When life doesn’t go as planned, trust your inner compass and go anyway.

Agile, Not Fragile is the podcast for CEOs and founders of $20M+ companies who are ready to build businesses that scale with clarity, consistency, and control.

Hosted by Enterprise Growth Systems (EGS) co-founders Tamara Loehr and Natalie Nichols, this series unpacks the strategies, systems, and structures behind high-performing, enterprise-ready companies.


Each episode focuses on practical frameworks and real-world execution, including:

  • Designing predictable, repeatable revenue models
  • Building in-house growth engines powered by A-team talent
  • Leveraging AI, automation, and global teams for scale
  • Optimising operations using the Red/Blue/Black™ framework
  • Increasing profitability, efficiency, and enterprise value

This is a behind-the-scenes look at how $20M+ businesses are structured to grow with intention and perform at the highest level.

title: The Chief Legatee: A Wedding Day Mystery
description: On a seemingly perfect wedding day, the groom notices a sudden shift in his bride, Georgian Hazen. What was once a joyful occasion transforms into a moment filled with mystery and tension. As the story unfolds, secrets buried in the past start to surface, unraveling a complex web of deception and intrigue. Anna Katharine Green masterfully explores themes of love, betrayal, and the quest for truth in this captivating detective fiction. Dive into the world of Chief Legatee, where every character harbors hidden motives and every revelation leads to more questions. Who can be trusted? What really happened on that fateful day? Join the investigation and discover the twists and turns that will keep you guessing until the very end.

With each twist and turn, Stone uncovers hidden truths and confronts unexpected suspects, leading to a thrilling climax that will keep you on the edge of your seat. title: Grace at Morning, Peace at night.
description:
Welcome to Grace at Morning, Peace at Night

title: Slam China: As Red Terror Approaches By Wayne T Haaland
description:
Dive headfirst into a high-octane geopolitical thriller as decorated Marine deserter Jack Flashhardt races against time to unravel a terrifying global web of Chinese-backed terror. This season throws you into the heart of a covert war, where fentanyl, ransomware, and betrayal threaten to engulf America, forcing you to confront the true cost of heroism and sacrifice.
Listeners will gain an unparalleled understanding of the complex, often unseen, landscape of modern geopolitical threats, from the dark economics of transnational fentanyl operations to the intricate mechanisms of state-sponsored cyber warfare. You'll learn to identify the subtle signs of international intrigue and how disparate global conflicts can converge on American soil, offering a sobering look at the real-world strategies employed to combat these insidious dangers. This series will sharpen your perception of global security, revealing the hidden front lines of an undeclared war.
This season is meticulously crafted for the listener who craves pulse-pounding action, intricate espionage, and a deep dive into the shadowy world of global power struggles. If you're drawn to stories of redemption, relentless patriotism, and characters fighting against insurmountable odds to protect the very fabric of their nation, then prepare to be utterly gripped. You understand that fiction can illuminate real-world dangers, and you're ready to experience a narrative that feels ripped from tomorrow's headlines.

title: The Budget Boys Podcast
author: Coach MT
description:
Welcome to The Budget Boys Podcast—the show that helps everyday people stop leaking money and start building real wealth.


Most people don't have an income problem.


They have an allocation problem.


Each week, we break down simple, practical strategies to help you keep more of what you earn, eliminate financial leaks, build emergency savings, invest with confidence, and create lasting financial freedom using the proven Five Jar Allocation System™.


Whether you're living paycheck to paycheck, paying off debt, growing your income, or working toward financial independence, this podcast gives you the tools, mindset, and action plan to move forward—without complicated budgets or financial jargon.


Inside each episode, you'll learn:

  • 💰 How to find and eliminate hidden money leaks
  • 🏦 How to build an emergency fund and lasting financial security
  • 📈 How to allocate your money to create long-term wealth
  • 💳 Practical strategies for reducing debt and improving cash flow
  • 🚀 Ways to increase your income and build multiple streams of revenue

Our mission is simple:

Help one million families take control of their money and build generational wealth—one smart financial decision at a time.

If you're ready to stop surviving, start thriving, and build a future you can be proud of, you're in the right place.

As the youngest of eight kids from Oregon, I’ve learned a lot about perseverance, purpose, and trusting God’s plan. My prayer is that this podcast helps you grow deeper in your faith and live fully alive with purpose🫶🏼

description:
Business ideas, unwrapped.


Tri Diligence is the show where a business idea meets three people who've actually been in the room. Each episode we take one idea — yours, ours, or one plucked from the headlines — and unwrap it from three angles:


- Jake, the builder — brand, customers, and whether anyone will love this enough to tell a friend.
- Sarah, the backer — the unit economics, the margins, the market size, and when the money comes back.
- Ryan, the technologist — what you buy, what you build, and the operational traps hiding under the pitch.

We walk the whole business model — customers, value, channels, revenue, costs, partners — and pressure-test it against how comparable companies really performed: who IPO'd, who got acquired, who quietly went to zero. No hype, no hand-waving — just real data and the uncomfortable questions.

Every episode ends the way real diligence should: three clear verdicts — invest, wait, or pass — and the one first step each host would take.

Good ideas welcome. So are the hard numbers.

Tri Diligence is produced with AI and is made for entertainment and idea-exploration, not investment advice.

Real, raw conversations from the Soul of a Healer and the Heart of a Renegade.

This podcast is for the ones who never quite fit the mould.


The entrepreneurs, creatives, healers, coaches, black sheep, trail blazers, and generational pattern changers who reject the notion of building a life that looks good on paper but feels like someone else's.


Hosted by Dr. V & Ocean VanOhm, co-creators of Subconscious Imprinting Technique (SIT), founders of ROAR Funnels, and partners in business & life, this podcast explores emotional healing, subconscious patterns, personal transformation, somatic healing, root cause healing, and the psychosomatic, generational, and spiritual roots of chronic symptoms.


But this is not just a podcast about healing.


It is about the messy, wild, deeply human experience of becoming more of who you actually are.

… and building a business that reflects it!


Expect transparent conversations about identity, relationships, intuition, money, business, practitioner growth, nervous system patterns, personal development, and what it means to build a life that feels expansive and fully your own.


Some episodes will speak directly to practitioners who want to create deeper transformation for their clients and build a practice beyond the treatment room.

Others will explore the emotional patterns, inherited beliefs, and subconscious stories that affect all of us.


We don't follow the masses. We follow the mission.

We don't seek  permission. We trust our intuition. 

We don't try to fit in. We're here to lead.


Dr. V & Ocean drop f-bombs. They ask the questions nobody else wants to ask. They tell the truth even when it's uncomfortable. They have built a life & their businesses the renegade way.

title: A Tool Case, a Photocopier Engineer, & An Unexpected Chain of Events
author: David Trenton
description:
Hello, I'm Martin, and I'm from South London.


I'm 60 years old, happily married, and the proud father of nine children, over the years, life has taken me on quite a journey, full of laughter, challenges, surprises, and the occasional bit of chaos. 


Along the way, I've collected more than my fair share of stories and life experiences  so I thought it was about time I started to share them. Every story you hear on this podcast, is really based on a real life events or experience from my own life. 


I've occasionally added a little extra colour to make the stories a little more entertaining, but they're all rooted in things that really actually happened. Some of the stories will make you laugh, some might make you think, and the others are simply too unbelievable not to tell you about. Whatever the case, I hope you enjoy listening to them as much as I've enjoyed remembering them and writing about them.


This is just the beginning, trust me I've got plenty more stories waiting to be told, so I'll be releasing a few episodes to start with and seeing how they're received. If people really enjoy them, there's a whole lifetime of adventures, mishaps and memorable moments still to come, if not, at least I gave it a try.


If you'd like to know when a new episode is released, then please just follow the podcast or, if possible, leave me a little review or a comment. I'd genuinely love to hear what you think, because your feedback will help shape the future episodes.


Thanks for listening, and I hope you'll join me again for the next story.


Martin… from South London.

title: Siddhartha by  Hermann Hesse
description: A major preoccupation of Hesse in writing Siddhartha was to cure his "sickness with life" (Lebenskrankheit) by immersing himself in Indian philosophy such as that expounded in the Upanishads and the Bhagavad Gita. The reason the second half of the book took so long to write was that Hesse "had not experienced that transcendental state of unity to which Siddhartha aspires. In an attempt to do so, Hesse lived as a virtual semi-recluse and became totally immersed in the sacred teachings of both Hindu and Buddhist scriptures. His intention was to attain to that 'completeness' which, in the novel, is the Buddha's badge of distinction." The novel is structured on three of the traditional stages of life for Hindu males (student (brahmacharin), householder (grihastha) and recluse/renunciate (vanaprastha)) as well as the Buddha's four noble truths (Part One) and eight-fold path (Part Two) which form twelve chapters, the number in the novel. Ralph Freedman mentions how Hesse commented in a letter "[my] Siddhartha does not, in the end, learn true wisdom from any teacher, but from a river that roars in a funny way and from a kindly old fool who always smiles and is secretly a saint." In a lecture about Siddhartha, Hesse claimed "Buddha's way to salvation has often been criticized and doubted, because it is thought to be wholly grounded in cognition. True, but it's not just intellectual cognition, not just learning and knowing, but spiritual experience that can be earned only through strict discipline in a selfless life". Freedman also points out how Siddhartha described Hesse's interior dialectic: "All of the contrasting poles of his life were sharply etched: the restless departures and the search for stillness at home; the diversity of experience and the harmony of a unifying spirit; the security of religious dogma and the anxiety of freedom." Eberhard Ostermann has shown how Hesse, while mixing the religious genre of the legend with that of the modern novel, seeks to reconcile with the double-edged effects of modernization such as individualization, pluralism or self-disciplining. - Summary by Wikipedia

From navigating identity through adoption, to surviving betrayal in marriage, to rebuilding life after the death of a spouse by suicide, Cheryl and Candace bring both professional insight and deeply personal truth into every conversation.

Together, they create a space where high-functioning masks are taken off, and the realities people carry behind the scenes are finally spoken out loud.

This podcast explores trauma, abandonment, addiction, adoption, suicide, and life’s deepest secrets—while also illuminating what it truly means to do the work, heal, and rebuild.

Because this isn’t just about what breaks us…
it’s about what becomes possible when we face it.

description: Welcome to today's episode! It helps you instantly identify matching items, missing values, duplicates, and differences between two lists without spending hours checking each entry. title: Hell Cats
author: VALOR Media Network
description:
Hell Cats is a veteran-led podcast hosted by Marine Corps veteran Maura Sullivan and Navy veteran Rebecca Bennett.

Each week, Maura and Rebecca sit down with women who have served their country—in uniform and beyond—to explore leadership, military service, family, public service, and the challenges facing America today. Through candid conversations with veterans, military leaders, journalists, historians, and changemakers, Hell Cats shines a light on voices too often overlooked in conversations about national security and civic leadership.

The show’s name honors the “Lady Hell Cats,” some of the first women to serve in the United States Marine Corps more than a century ago. At a time when women were told they couldn’t serve, they stepped forward anyway, helping open doors for generations who followed.

Now, at a moment when the contributions of women in uniform are once again being questioned, Hell Cats creates space for those women to tell their own stories—in their own words.

Produced by VALOR Media Network in partnership with Meidas Defense, Hell Cats is available wherever you get your podcasts.

Editorial Note

Hell Cats is an independent production of VALOR Media Network created for journalistic, educational, and public-interest purposes.

VALOR Media Network exercises sole editorial control over the program’s content, production, and distribution. While some hosts and guests may be candidates for public office, Hell Cats is not produced by, authorized by, requested by, or coordinated with any political campaign or candidate committee. Participation in the program does not constitute an endorsement by VALOR Media Network.

title: Combat Ready Swords – Built for Performa
description: What makes a sword truly exceptional? For many enthusiasts, the answer lies in Combat Ready Swords—blades designed with strength, balance, and quality craftsmanship in mind. Unlike decorative display pieces, combat-ready swords are built with durability and structural integrity as key priorities. Every detail, from the blade geometry to the grip and overall balance, is carefully considered to create a functional and impressive piece. Whether you're passionate about historical-inspired weapons, martial arts training, or simply appreciate masterful craftsmanship, these swords represent the perfect blend of engineering and tradition. Collectors value them not only for their striking appearance but also for the precision and attention to detail that goes into every blade. If you're looking to explore a premium selection of Combat Ready Swords, visit the Swords Collection at: https://www.thevortexblades.com/collections/swords. Discover a range of expertly crafted swords that celebrate history, craftsmanship, and timeless design for every sword enthusiast.

title: The Steve Eisner Show
author: Steve Eisner
description: The Steve Eisner Show delivers unapologetic political commentary from a conservative, America First perspective. Host Steve Eisner breaks down the biggest headlines in politics, culture, and current events with candid analysis, spirited debate, and occasional dives into sports and other topics shaping the national conversation. If you're looking for direct, opinion-driven commentary on today's news, you've found it.

title: Confessions Of Mormon Boys
author: Stacey Harkey, Adam Berg
description: Just two best friends telling chaotically unfiltered stories about growing up at the intersection of being Gay and being Mormon

title: As The Clown Turns: Holiday Oil Podcast
author: The Pod Mill
description: As the Clown Turns is the official podcast of Holiday Oil, Utah’s beloved family-run gas station brand. Each episode invites listeners behind the counter and into the stories that have shaped this legacy business across generations—sharing the milestones, challenges, and everyday moments that built a trusted local institution grounded in quality, integrity, and genuine community care. Blending professional insight with the warm, lighthearted spirit that defines the brand, the show celebrates how Holiday Oil has stayed true to its values while keeping things fun along the way. Whether you’re a longtime customer, a fellow business owner, or simply enjoy stories of family, grit, and good old-fashioned service, tune in and discover what keeps this Utah classic turning strong.

title: Founding Encounters
author: Roya Hakakian
description:
Founding Encounters is a podcast series about the lesser known stories of the relationship between the Middle East and America in its earliest years. To mark the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence, this show will focus on unexpected and overlooked details of the founding years, taking listeners through the harbors of Morocco, the narrow bazaars of Tunis, the tobacco fields of Virginia, the naval battles in the distant seas, and much more. 

These experiences formed America’s initial understanding of the Middle East. Hosted by award-winning author Roya Hakakian, this eight-part series will begin with the story of President Thomas Jefferson and the Quran he bought as a young law student, and will continue with the account of America’s first alliance: its partnership with Morocco, who recognized the country in 1777, before anyone else. We will highlight the lives of several notable individuals of Middle Eastern origin who made indelible contributions to their people and ours.

title: Wondered
author: Xizhi Chan
description:
This podcast series investigates the origins and evolution of biotech innovators. We provide a multi-dimensional analysis of how laboratory uncertainty is transformed into life-saving medicine and forged into a durable, world-changing business, with deep-dive into:
  - R&D: Tracing the journey from science to Phase III clinical trials.
    - Finance: Navigating capital structures, financing, and long-term value creation.
    - Regulation: Mastering FDA and global market authorization strategies.
    - Leadership: The corporate culture, decision-making, and endurance.

title: Be Locally Loved
author: Laura Capes Terry
description:
Hosted by Laura Capes Terry, Be Locally Loved spotlights beloved local businesses, community leaders, creative connectors who are building stronger communities through trust, connection, and serving others well.
At its core, Be Locally Loved is about connection.
In a world where rapid growth can make communities feel more disconnected, Be Locally Loved shines a spotlight on the businesses, organizations, individuals, and places creating trust, belonging, and real human connection at the local level.
Through podcast conversations, social storytelling, and local features, Be Locally Loved explores what it means to become known, trusted, and deeply rooted within a community, not through hype or self-promotion, but through service, relationships, authenticity, and showing up consistently over time.
You’ll hear inspiring stories, practical insights, and thoughtful conversations about:
• Building businesses people know, love, and trust
• Strengthening community through relationships
• Helping communities grow without losing connection
• Leadership, visibility, and authentic marketing
• The hidden power of being locally loved
Whether you’re a business owner, entrepreneur, community leader, creative connector, or someone who simply loves where they live, Be Locally Loved exists to celebrate the people and places making local life more connected, meaningful, and human.
Because thriving communities don’t happen by accident.
They happen when people choose to show up, serve well, build trust, and become locally loved.
And we believe those stories deserve to be seen, shared, and celebrated.

title: Gullah Geechee Biz
author: Gullah Geechee Biz
description: Celebrating and preserving Gullah Geechee culture, heritage, and entrepreneurship. Join us as we explore the rich traditions of the Sea Island people — from food and language to business, history, and community. Whether you're a descendant, a cultural enthusiast, or an entrepreneur inspired by our roots, this podcast is your home. Our heritage. Our business.

title: Not Just Because - Vehicles
description: How vehicles move people and things through the world, from rescue trucks to rockets, with clear, age-appropriate explanations of parts, power, and safety.

title: The underthestarsbabe’s Podcast
author: underthestarsbabe
description:
Core Principle: Everything is energy, and like frequencies attract similar experiences. By consciously raising your vibration through thoughts, actions, and practices, you can manifest your desired outcomes.
2.
The podcast aims to inspire listeners to take empowered, intentional steps towards creating their dream life through the Law of Attraction principles.
